meta.summary: RDKit 2026.03.4 Python cheminformatics runtime with native amd64/arm64 builds, core shared libraries, runtime data, upstream Contrib files, and scientific Python dependencies.
meta.description: RDKit 2026.03.4 Python cheminformatics runtime with native amd64/arm64 builds, core shared libraries, runtime data, upstream Contrib files, and scientific Python dependencies.

test: rdkit-runtime-info --json | grep -F '"rdkit": "2026.03.4"' >/dev/null && rdkit-runtime-info --json | grep -F '"inchi": "available"' >/dev/null && python -c 'import rdkit; from rdkit import Avalon, Chem, DataManip, Dbase, DistanceGeometry, ForceField, Geometry, ML, Numerics, SimDivFilters, VLib; from rdkit.Chem import AllChem, Draw, PandasTools, inchi, rdCoordGen, rdFreeSASA, rdMolDescriptors; assert rdkit.__version__ == "2026.03.4"; print(rdkit.__version__)' | grep -Fx '2026.03.4' >/dev/null

python --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage: python' >/dev/null && python -m rdkit.Chem.ChemUtils.SDFToCSV --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Convert SDF file to CSV' >/dev/null && rdkit-runtime-info --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'runtime versions' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-rdkit-smoke-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; python /opt/rdkit/share/testdata/rdkit-smoke.py "$tmp" && test -s "$tmp/molecules.sdf" && test -s "$tmp/molecule.svg" && test -s "$tmp/molecule.png" && test -s "$tmp/summary.tsv" && grep -F 'rdkit_version' "$tmp/summary.tsv" | grep -F '2026.03.4' >/dev/null && python -m rdkit.Chem.ChemUtils.SDFToCSV "$tmp/molecules.sdf" "$tmp/molecules.csv" && test -s "$tmp/molecules.csv" && grep -F 'SMILES' "$tmp/molecules.csv" >/dev/null && grep -F 'aspirin' "$tmp/molecules.csv" >/dev/null && rm -rf "$tmp"
